item.title: A young woman stayed with her horse for 3 hours, holding his head above water to keep him from drowning after he got trapped in mud.
item.description: The 500kg horse, named Astro, was freed with the help of a tractor and harness at Avalon Beach in Victoria, Australia.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Bad news for Trump
item.dc:creator: wafflesdidit

item.title: 14.5 years without personal space
item.description:
Our space comrade. This is a sad post. Don't read the captions anymore. Everything else is just pictures of the best cat. Spoilers in the next one.
This is Professor. He was the best cat.
He neither understood, nor respected, personal space.
I've gone my whole adult life without personal space. I got him when I turned 19 and was supporting myself.
I've wondered for years what it would be like to have personal space.
He's always just been there. Demanding attention.
Always in my space or by my side.
Look at them whiskers. So long.
He also didn't respect craft storage.
At all.
He loved his brother.
They were best friends.
No personal space. If you were going potty, he was there for you.
Just a sweet little dude. Look at them whiskers. So long. So tickly.
Sink cat.
He was always in or on my face.
He loved his aunt.
Sweet brothers.
Them eyebrows.
Sitting on the chair everyone saw in the early 2000s.
Snuggled with anyone who gave him attention.
Just wanted to make sure he was touching me while he slept.
There really was no personal space. It was all communal.
I remain surprised i caught this picture. He laid on my chest and stuck his nose directly on mine. The wrong movement could have ended the moment. There were very few movements available that weren't wrong.
If he could have cut me open and slept in my chest cavity, he would have.
It's been almost a week of personal space now. It sucks.
Those purple unicorns.
I had to give him a peaceful way out.
He was suffering.
He started spending more time hiding in the closet than he did next to me.
He stopped sleeping on the pillow next to mine.
He still came to bed.
I'm a side sleeper. He slept on top of the side I wasn't sleeping on.
His teef didn't fit in his mouf.
Man he loved those purple unicorns. He didn't care about any other toy.
They don't even look like unicorns.
Just a flat amorphous blob with a horn on the forehead and feathers on the butt.
He'd pull the feathers out. Once those were gone, it was no longer worthy of his love.
He guarded them jealously.
He was such a great cat.
I had to give him peace.
I had to accept that my personal space was going to be mine and only mine.
I had to make Vinnie an only cat.
He was hurting.
It was the right thing to do.
It was the best thing for him.
He was no longer eating dry food and started drooling and doing this weird jaw stretch and teeth clacking thing. He had been wheezing for a while, and the vet couldn't explain it. He was spending more time hiding in the closet than in my face demanding attention. Now he's gone, and my personal space is only mine. I love my buddy and would give up my personal space forever if I meant he was the one invading it. I did the right thing for him. He's gone now.
item.dc:creator: IsAHotdogASandwich

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 264
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: The Butter it BURNS IS US!
item.description: Remember, never use roasts for only steak grilling. I know it's a tiktok but I thought this was genuinely funny and informative. Plus his Gronk and Smeagol impression is on point. Sauce: Farming While Beige https://youtube.com/@blackbirdcoop?si=e-6MjXlMoVtu0iM0

item.title: GovBrief Today #477
item.description: Kilmar Abrego Garcia will sleep tonight without a criminal charge against him. Judge Paula Xinis in Maryland ordered him brought home last year from a Salvadoran torture prison where guards beat him with batons and kept him on his knees through the night. The Supreme Court agreed. The administration produced him in handcuffs and charged him with human smuggling for a three-year-old traffic stop that ended with a warning. All the while, they mocked him and his family and said he would never live in America again. Judge Waverly Crenshaw threw the charges out Friday and called the prosecution an abuse of prosecuting power. Kilmar Abrego Garcia may still be deported. He is not in the torture place, and he is not convicted of charges the government wouldn't defend. None of this is fair. Tonight is better. I've emailed 7,535 stories over 477 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260522-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iceye-russia [2] https://go.govbrief.today/lendry-oil [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may22 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/service-animals [5] https://go.govbrief.today/wright-climate [6] https://go.govbrief.today/warsh-sworn [7] https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-resigns [8] https://go.govbrief.today/green-card-change [9] https://go.govbrief.today/nonprofit-probe [10] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-app [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-colbert [12] https://go.govbrief.today/trumpjr-wedding [13] https://go.govbrief.today/lutnick-donation [14] https://go.govbrief.today/softbank-library [15] https://go.govbrief.today/kilmar-dismissal Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
